# Account Tax One VAT Sale

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:5a68fdcdbd3a0d5f7a16bdcc13424a59797bc92303723035d3bce3ff5e468919
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module ensures that only one VAT tax can be selected on a
salle order line. It uses and complements the module
account_tax_one_vat.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-invoicing/issues).
